reviews.comment:
El atractivo del sitio, para mí, es el parque arbolado (algo descuidado) que hay a su costado (no sé si es del ACA o es público) En cuanto a servicios, es mejor la Terminal de Servicios que se encuentra en el centro de la de la autovía y que tiene acceso por ambas manos, con baños que se aprecian más cuidados y limpieza continua.

(Translated by Google)
The attraction of the site, for me, is the wooded park (somewhat neglected) that is next to it (I don't know if it belongs to the ACA or is public). In terms of services, the Service Terminal located in the center of the highway and which has access from both sides is better, with bathrooms that seem better maintained and continuously cleaned.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaGZTa29BRRAB
